column1: そんな簡単な問題は、子どもさえ解ける。
column2: そんなかんたんなもんだいは、こどもさえとける。
column3: Even a child can solve such a simple problem.
column4: さえ (even / as long as / if only)
column5: Noun + さえ (even N) / Verb[て-form] + さえ (even doing V) / さえ + いれば (as long as)
column6: N+さえ = 'even N' (unexpected inclusion); さえ+いれば = 'as long as, if only' (minimal sufficient condition)
column8: さえ = even (unexpected degree) or as long as (minimal condition); でも = even (more casual); すら = even (more formal/literary)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:さえ source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
